acceptance_rule: candidate value must be below Phase 29 and no higher than Phase 27
rationale: The selected candidate targets the manhole-nonzero false-dry failure mode.

acceptance_rule: candidate value must be <= Phase 27 plus 2 percent tolerance
rationale: Depth-error regressions cannot be traded for a single proxy improvement.

acceptance_rule: candidate value may improve this proxy only if all required error guardrails pass
rationale: Volume-bias proxy improvement alone cannot authorize pilot acceptance.

acceptance_rule: all claims must remain Level 4+ proxy diagnostics with no Level 5, SWE/PINN, strict conservation, full mass conservation, or hydrodynamic closure claim
rationale: A future pilot remains proxy-scoped and cannot rely on unavailable Level 5 variables.
